craigslist.title: Apartment Alternative: Fully Furnished with a Kitchen
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Weekly Price, Plus Tax Experience Hassle-Free Living with Our No-Lease, No-Deposit Policy! WELCOME TO THE BEST APARTMENT ALTERNATIVE IN THE AREA! Our all-inclusive pricing helps you save money every month, with the option to pay weekly or monthly. Enjoy the freedom of no lease, no deposit, and no credit check, allowing you to move in and out at your convenience. Amenities Include: Take a tour to see why we are different and better! 24/7 vending machines with snacks and drinks Great all inclusive prices. The best value in town! Secure property with key-controlled access 24/7 on-site laundry faciliites Free Wi-Fi & Cable Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat No Deposit - Check-in any time Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly No Lease - Check out on your schedule Various Studio Layouts; Choose what's right for you! Our dedicated staff is on-site around the clock, and the property features 24/7 key-controlled access for your safety and convenience. We are proud to be pet-friendly, welcoming up to two dogs under 50 lbs. (pet fee applies). Book Your Stay Today! Experience the best value in Independence! Contact Us Now: Call or email us to reserve your spot! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: show contact info Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information. Extra charge for additional beds.
